context.decision_reason: Priority tier: deployment_blockers + missing_critical_features. RESEARCHER, FEATURE_AUDIT, and GAP_ANALYZER have all completed and produced rich findings: 11 P0 critical gaps (no code exists at all), 6 P1 high-priority gaps, 7 P2 gaps. Total 24 features missing across the entire Cashu mint protocol. No source code, no framework, no database, no crypto engine — nothing. Prior CONDUCTOR round was unproductive only because the discover workflow had not yet run. Now it has completed. TASK_SYNTHESIZER must synthesize gap_analyzer_output.json and feature_audit_output.json into ordered worker tasks following the recommended build sequence: (1) bootstrap project + choose tech stack, (2) NUT-00 BDHKE crypto engine, (3) database layer, (4) REST API server, (5) NUT-01/02 keyset management, (6) NUT-03 token swap + double-spend prevention, (7) Lightning backend integration, (8) NUT-04 minting flow, (9) NUT-05 melting flow, (10) NUT-06 info endpoint, (11) operator configuration system. Focus on P0 gaps first (blocking items), then P1.
context.what_you_learned: cashu-mint is a completely greenfield project — zero source code exists. RESEARCHER identified it as a Cashu ecash protocol mint requiring 7 mandatory NUT implementations (NUT-00 through NUT-06) plus foundational infrastructure. FEATURE_AUDIT confirmed 0% coverage across 24 surveyed features with 11 critical missing items. GAP_ANALYZER produced an ordered build plan with 11 P0 blocking gaps, 6 P1 operational gaps, and 7 P2 quality gaps. Prior CONDUCTOR round 1 was unproductive because it ran before the discover workflow completed. All discovery is now done. The project is at 0% completion in the setup stage. No tasks have been synthesized or assigned to workers yet.
context.synthesis_instructions: This is a greenfield build. Create worker tasks in the recommended build order (infrastructure first, then protocol layer, then API endpoints). Tech stack recommendation: Python with FastAPI (matches Nutshell reference impl, well-understood in the Cashu community) or TypeScript with Bun/Express. Choose one and bootstrap. Prioritize P0 gaps first — especially the crypto engine (NUT-00 BDHKE) and database layer, as everything else depends on them. Each task should be a standalone implementable unit. Reference implementations: cashubtc/nutshell (Python), elnosh/gonuts (Go), cashubtc/cdk (Rust).
